title: Order Sync Pipeline Health (Drone Shop → CRM)
description: Monitors the cross-service order synchronization pipeline between Drone Shop and CRM Portal. Tracks sync success/failure rates, created/updated orders, and detects sync anomalies.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and msg = 'External orders sync completed' | stats count as SyncCycles, distinctcount('Trace ID') as UniqueRuns, unique('Orders Sync Created') as CreatedCounts, unique('Orders Sync Updated') as UpdatedCounts, unique('Orders Sync Failed') as FailedCounts by 'Orders Sync Source' | sort -SyncCycles
falsepositives: Expected failures during Drone Shop maintenance windows
